candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total line.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; useful as lower-priority fallback if label changes across years.
Ancillary income, not total revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue.
Investment income, not operating revenue.
Ancillary income, not total revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list, not to be summed. 'Revenue' is preferred; 'Total Revenue' is a duplicate fallback.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs and main cost-of-sales style line.
Non-recurring acquisition-related cost, not COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the main direct operating cost line.

candidates.why: Personnel-related operating overhead; strong SG&A component.
Broad overhead bucket above operating profit; appropriate SG&A component when no explicit SG&A line exists.
Selling expense, but appears to be a subcomponent of broader operating expenses in some years, so including it alongside 'Other operating expenses' risks double counting.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not an expense.
Headcount metric, not an expense line.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total line is present. Selected the best overhead buckets above operating profit. Excluded 'Marketing Expense' because it appears to be a subcomponent of broader operating expenses and would likely double count.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Total finance cost line, but less preferred than granular recurring interest components.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities at amortised cost
candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense on debt; strong match.
Recurring financing cost related to leases; should be included.
Potential recurring finance cost, though somewhat broader/more mixed than pure interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure that appears to duplicate lease interest already shown in the main statement.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities at amortised cost

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components instead of total 'Financial expenses' to avoid double counting. Excluded FX losses and supplemental lease-interest disclosure.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution line, not balance sheet equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Best available total equity attributable to shareholders; preferable to Total Equity when no separate NCI line exists.
Total equity line; acceptable fallback, but could include NCI if any existed.
Shareholder count, not equity value.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interest line is present. Preferred 'Shareholders' Equity - Total' as book equity attributable to shareholders, with 'Total Equity' as fallback if labels change across years.
